prompt: Create a clean luxury skincare product advertisement in a square 1:1 layout with a warm beige studio background and strong natural sunlight casting soft palm-leaf shadows across the wall. Place 1 amber glass dropper bottle on the left-center, standing upright on a round cream stone pedestal. The bottle has a glossy gold collar and a matte white rubber dropper top. Add a white rectangular label with elegant minimal typography: brand name "NATURELLE SKINCARE" at the top, a large orange product name "VITAMIN C", then black text reading "BRIGHTENING SERUM" and smaller subtext "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide". Surround the pedestal with 3 visible glossy green tropical leaves, arranged from the left edge and behind the bottle for a fresh botanical look. On the right side, place a large bold black serif headline in 3 stacked lines reading "Glow Naturally. Every Day.". Beneath it, add a smaller clean sans-serif benefits line reading "Brightens | Hydrates | Protects". Below that, include 3 circular black outline ingredient or values icons in a horizontal row, each with a simple leaf-style symbol inside; add tiny caption text beneath them with the same slightly imperfect ad-like wording seen in the original, including "Barban Free", "Dermicologyg", and "Creuty-free". At the lower right, place a glossy rounded green call-to-action button with white bold text "Shop Now". Add 1 sliced orange on the far right edge, partially cropped, with vivid juicy texture to reinforce the vitamin C theme. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Style the whole image as a polished commercial product mockup, photorealistic, high-end beauty branding, soft warm highlights, subtle shadows, balanced composition, sharp label detail, premium ecommerce social ad aesthetic.
